channel.title: AP News - US News
channel.description: Top US News stories from AP News

item.title: Staggering amounts of fentanyl hit streets as the DEA watched and took no action, records show
item.description: The U.S. Drug Enforcement Administration allowed hundreds of thousands of fentanyl pills to hit the streets of New Mexico from 2023 to 2025, according to current and former DEA agents and records reviewed by The Associated Press.

item.title: Heat, wind and drought conditions spark wildfires in US West
7 killed and dozens injured following series of weekend shootings in Chicago
